inbound.choose:
<when condition="@(context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true)?.ContainsKey("model") == true)">
                <set-variable name="requestedModel" value="@(context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true)["model"].ToString())" />
                
                    
                        
                            
                            
                                application/json
                            
                            @{
                                return new JObject(
                                    new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("code", "ModelNotAllowed"),
                                        new JProperty("message", $"Model '{context.Variables["requestedModel"]}' is not allowed for this subscription. Allowed models: gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4o, text-embedding-3-large")
                                    ))
                                ).ToString();
                            }
